ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "broker_name" TEXT /* Name of the broker */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the broker is based */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the broker */,
  "broker_website" TEXT /* URL of the broker's website */,
  "broker_logo" TEXT /* Path to the broker's logo */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the broker was registered on the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the broker is currently active */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body overseeing the broker */,
  "minimum_deposit" REAL /* Minimum deposit required to open an account with the broker */,
  "leverage_ratio" REAL /* Leverage ratio offered by the broker */,
  "trading_platforms" TEXT /* List of trading platforms supported by the broker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset (e.g., EURUSD, Bitcoin) */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., currency, stock, cryptocurrency) */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the asset */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency of the asset */,
  "asset_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or ticker of the asset */,
  "asset_description" TEXT /* Description of the asset for user information */,
  "is Tradable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the asset is currently tradable */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the asset (if applicable) */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume of the asset (if applicable) */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* 24-hour price change percentage of the asset (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee entry */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker associated with the fee */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset associated with the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., spread, commission) */,
  "fee_value" TEXT /* Value of the fee (e.g., amount, percentage range) */,
  "fee_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the fee structure became effective */,
  "fee_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the fee structure will be discontinued */,
  "is_variable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the fee is variable */,
  "minimum_fee" REAL /* Minimum fee amount (if applicable) */,
  "maximum_fee" REAL /* Maximum fee amount (if applicable) */,
  "fee_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fee is charged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_fees_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_fees_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address for billing and verification */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth for age verification */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user's account is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the trade */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being traded */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker through which the trade was made */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Value of the trade in the base currency */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee paid for the trade */,
  "trade_profit" REAL /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  "leverage_used" REAL /* Leverage used for the trade (if applicable) */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order associated with the trade */,
  "execution_speed" REAL /* Time taken for the trade to be executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the analysis is related to */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades made by the user */,
  "average_fee" REAL /* Average trading fee incurred by the user */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit or loss from the user's trades */,
  "total_trades_won" INTEGER /* Total number of profitable trades */,
  "total_trades_lost" INTEGER /* Total number of unprofitable trades */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Percentage of profitable trades */,
  "risk_reward_ratio" REAL /* Average risk-reward ratio of the trades */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the trading strategy */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio of the trading strategy */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown of the trading account */,
  "profit_factor" REAL /* Profit factor of the trading strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broker_promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker offering the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotional offer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., commission-free trades, cashback) */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for users to be eligible for the promotion */,
  "terms_and_conditions" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the promotion */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the promotion (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the promotion is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broker_promotions_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_broker" TEXT /* Preferred broker for trading */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Preferred asset type for trading (e.g., currency, stock) */,
  "preferred_trading_time" TEXT /* Preferred trading time (e.g., morning, evening) */,
  "trading_strategy" TEXT /* Preferred trading strategy (e.g., scalping, swing trading) */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the user (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "preferred_leverage" REAL /* Preferred leverage ratio for trading */,
  "preferred_trading_volume" REAL /* Preferred trading volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_fees" (
  "historical_fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical fee entry */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker associated with the fee */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset associated with the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., spread, commission) */,
  "fee_value" TEXT /* Value of the fee (e.g., amount, percentage range) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the fee was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical fee data (e.g., broker's website, API) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the historical fee data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "fee_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the fee change (e.g., market conditions, broker policy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_fees_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_fees_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., fee change, promotion) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the notification is important */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., pending, sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
